name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate daily accounts receivable aging reports and send alerts to collections teams instead of manual tracking of invoices and reminders.
problem_solved: Tracking overdue payments and managing cash flow effectively.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Tracking overdue payments and managing cash flow effectively.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate daily accounts receivable aging reports and send alerts to collections teams instead of manual tracking of invoices and reminders.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of invoices and reminders
